name: Mania of Mortality
description: Whenever a nearby enemy, ally, or minion dies, you have a 10% chance to gain ward.

stats.key: Chance To Gain Ward On Nearby Death

name: Ethereal Revenant
description: When damage leaves you below half health, you summon a {Revenant,} a melee minion with decaying health whose damage scales with your intelligence . This effect has a 15 second cooldown.

name: Blood Pact
description: You deal increased damage, but you lose a percent of your maximum health each second if you have killed an enemy recently (last 4 seconds).

name: Putrid Demise
description: You have additional poison resistance, and whenever you kill an enemy you have a chance to inflict poison on the enemies around them.

stats.key: Chance To Poison Nearby Enemies On Kill

name: Elixir of Hunger
description: You have additional health, and when you use a potion you and your minions are imbued with {Hunger,} granting 10% increased attack and cast speed and 10 health gained on hit.

name: Life Drinker
description: Whenever you use a potion you also consume a random minion, killing it to restore health. The health gained in this manner is equal to a percentage of the minion's current health.

stats.key: Percent Of Minion's Current HP Consumed

name: Reclamation of Souls
description: You have increased ward retention, and are granted ward whenever one of your minions die.

name: Wisp Weaver
description: Whenever you use a minion skill, you have a chance to gain ward equal to the mana spent.

name: Soul Drinker
description: You are granted a percentage of excess healing from {Life Drinker} .

name: Mark of Punishment
description:
Whenever one of your minions die, it has a chance to mark the nearest enemy for death for 5 seconds.

{Mark for Death} is a curse that lasts for 8 seconds and reduces all resistances by 25%. It cannot stack.

stats.key: Chance To Mark Nearby Enemy On Minion Death

name: Dark Retribution
description:
Whenever one of your minions dies, you have a chance to summon a {Skeleton Vanguard} from its corpse, a minion that deals melee physical damage using a spear. You are limited to 3 active skeleton vanguards.
This node also grants additional melee physical damage to Skeleton Vanguards summoned from any source.

name: Hollow Lich
description: All sources of health leech are converted to increased damage at 10 times their value.

name: Cling To Life
description: Grants you Vitality and grants your minions all resistances.

name: Dance with Death
description: You deal increased damage. This bonus is tripled when you are below 35% health.

name: Harvested Legions
description:
Whenever you kill an enemy you have a chance to summon a {Skeleton Vanguard} from its corpse, a minion that deals melee physical damage using a spear. You are limited to 3 active skeleton vanguards.
This node also grants increased health to Skeleton Vanguards summoned from any source.

name: Soul Barrier
description: When you drop below half health, you are granted ward. This effect has a 12 second cooldown.

name: Reaper
description: Your spells and melee attacks instantly kill enemies that they leave below a health threshold (a percentage of their maximum health).

name: Life Barrier
description: {Soul Barrier} grants additional ward equal to your vitality.

name: Spirit Lure
description: {Soul Barrier} has a reduced cooldown.

name: Volatile Blood
description: Effects that drain a percentage of your health per second drain reduced health, and when you are stunned you have a chance to release a {Wave of Blood,} dealing physical damage to nearby enemies.

stats.key: Chance To Cast Wave Of Blood When Stunned

name: Symbol of Decay
description: You deal increased damage over time if you are equipped with a one handed weapon and do not have a shield equipped.

name: Elixir of Death
description: When you use a potion you take less physical and necrotic damage for 4 seconds (multiplicative with other modifiers), but a percent of your current health is drained each second.

stats.key: Current Health Drained Per Second On Potion Use

name: Wands of the Fallen
description: You deal increased spell damage if you are equipped with a one handed weapon and do not have a shield equipped.

stats.key: Chance Per Curse to gain Mana on hit

name: Chaos Flames
description:
You deal increased fire damage and have a chance to ignite on hit with fire skills, and you deal increased necrotic damage and have a chance to inflict damned on hit with necrotic skills.

These effects also apply to your minions.

stats.key: More Damage over Time to Cursed
More Armor per Curse on Target

name: Dark Rituals
description: Your minions have increased attack and cast speed. This bonus also applies to you if you have used a minion skill in the last 10 seconds.

stats.key: Applies To Player For 10 Seconds On Minion Skill Use

name: Crimson Gluttony
description: You and your minions have increased health regeneration, and effects that drain a percentage of your health drain less health.

stats.key: Critical Strike Damage Leeched As Health
Minion Critical Strike Damage Leeched As Health

name: Empty The Graves
description: You have increased health regeneration and additional armor for each minion you control.

name: Contagion Engine
description: You deal increased damage over time if you have killed an enemy recently (last 4 seconds).

stats.key: Increased Damage Over Time On Recent Kill

name: Effigies
description:
When you take a hit while at low health you have a chance to consume one of your minions, stealing its current health to heal yourself.

Your minions deal increased fire and bow damage.

name: Aegisfall
description: Your minions have a chance to shred armour on hit

name: Moonlight Pyre
description: Your minions deal additional fire and necrotic damage with spells and attacks.

name: Veins of Malice
description: Whenever you cast a spell, you sacrifice 5% of your current health to grant your minions {Haste} and {Frenzy} for a duration. This effect has a 10 second cooldown.

name: Soul Aegis
description: Your minions have additional armor per character level.

name: Eye of Damnation
description: You and your minions deal increased necrotic damage and you have a chance to apply Damned on hit.

name: Dominion of Rot
description: You deal increased poison damage and your minions have a chance to poison on hit.

name: Veins of Power
description: You and your minions deal increased physical damage and have increased bleed duration

stats.key: Rip Blood on up to 5 enemies
Less Damage Taken Per Curse On Target

name: Ward of Malevolence
description:
You gain additional ward decay threshold and you gain ward on kill. 

You also gain ward per 2 points of Intelligence while channeling a skill.

stats.key: Ward Per Second Per 2 Intelligence While Channeling
Rip Blood Casts Each Second With Bleed Overload
Ward Decay Threshold Per 1% Necro Res

name: Doom Herald
description: You take less damage while channeling and deal more damage to damned enemies while channeling (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.key: More Damage to Damned while Channeling

name: Spirit Leech
description: A portion of the damage you do is returned to you .

name: Rancid Concoction
description: You gain ward and mana when you use a potion.

stats.key: Potion Spreads Poisons during Poison Overload

name: Encroaching Darkness
description: When you directly cast a {Curse} skill you also afflict a number of enemies around the target location with {Anguish}.

stats.key: Witchfire on Ignite or Damned Overload

name: Chaotic Strikes
description:
Your hits have a chance to deal double damage.

Additionally your hits have a chance to deal double damage per {Curse} on the target.

stats.key: Flame Whip on Hit or Kill against Ignited

name: Grasping Damnation
description: The Chains from the {Chains of Ruin} node last longer. Additionally damned that you inflict last longer.

stats.key: Chance to Chain Damned enemies each second
Hitting Boss or Rare triggers Anguish

name: Fleeting Crone
description:
You have a chance to gain {Haste} for 2 seconds when you kill a {Cursed} enemy or hit a {Cursed} boss or rare enemy.

Additionally {Haste} on you has increased effect.

stats.key: Haste Chance when Hitting Boss or Rare
More Damage Over Time per Overload
Cleanse all Curses when reaching Low Health
Ward Gain per Cleansed Curse on You

name: Grimhilde's Domain
description:
{Witchfire} that you inflict deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per global chance to ignite with fire skills and per global chance to inflict damned with necrotic skills.

Additionally while you have {Ignite} or {Damned Overload} your hits spread {Witchfire} to a number of enemies within 10 meters.

name: Aspect of Death
description: You have increased health and you deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of each negative ailment on you up to a maximum of 90.

stats.key: More Damage per Negative Ailment on You
Damn Yourself on Kill or Minion Kill

name: Elementalist
description: Increases your elemental damage

name: Reactive Ward
description: When you drop below 70% health you gain a burst of ward based on your maximum health. This effect has a 12 second cooldown.

name: Preparation
description: Every 3 seconds, your next elemental spell deals increased damage and has a chance to slow enemies on hit.

stats.key: Increased Cooldown Recovery Speed for Teleport
Increased Cooldown Recovery Speed for Snap Freeze

name: Arcane Current
description: When you hit an enemy with a lightning skill you cast {Arcane Lightning} at additional enemies, dealing lightning damage. This effect has a 5 second cooldown.

name: Arcane Flames
description: When you hit an enemy with a fire skill you {Ignite} additional nearby enemies. This effect has a 5 second cooldown.

name: Essence of Celerity
description: Each stack of {Arcane Momentum} lasts longer and also increases your spell damage.

name: Arcane Momentum
description:
When you cast a spell you gain a stack of {Arcane Momentum} for 2 seconds and refreshing the duration of all existing stacks.

Each stacks of Arcane Momentum increases your cast speed.

stats.key: Increased Mana Regen per 100 Max Mana

name: Lost Knowledge
description: You gain ward based on your current mana when you use a skill that costs at least 40 mana.

stats.key: Increased Spell Critical Strike Chance per Intelligence

name: Arcane Avalanche
description: Whenever you take a hit that leaves you below half health, you freeze nearby enemies. This effect has a 10 second cooldown.

name: Crackling Precision
description: You have an increased chance to critically strike with spells. This effect is doubled for lightning skills.

name: Rune of Winter
description:
Increases your chance to freeze and converts lightning blast and volcanic orb to cold spells, changing their base damage type to cold and giving them a chance to freeze.

Lightning Blast gains a base freeze rate of 46.

Volcanic Orb's core gains a base freeze rate of 40 and its shrapnel gains a freeze rate of 32.

name: Dragon Mage
description: You are granted increased damage with an element whenever you have casted a spell of another element recently (last 4 seconds).

stats.key: Increased Lightning Damage From Fire Skill Use
Increased Fire Damage From Cold Skill Use
Increased Cold Damage From Lightning Skill Use

name: Warder
description:
You have a chance to be granted ward whenever you hit an enemy with a fire, cold, or lightning skill.

This effect has a 10 second cooldown, but the cooldown is not shared between different elements, so you can gain ward from a fire hit and a lightning hit within the same 10 second duration.

stats.key: Increased Stun Duration with Lightning Spells
Value Tripled If You Have 200 Maximum Mana

name: Dragon Breath
description: You are granted an additional chance to apply an elemental ailment with skills of the same element whenever you have casted a spell of another element recently (last 4 seconds).

stats.key: Lightning Skill Shock Chance From Fire Skill Use
Fire Skill Ignite Chance From Cold Skill Use
Cold Skill Chill Chance From Lightning Skill Use

name: Arcane Warden
description: You gain ward when you use an elemental melee attack and hit at least one enemy.

name: Elemental Strikes
description: Your fire melee attacks have a chance to ignite on hit. Your cold melee attacks have a chance to chill on hit. Your lightning melee attacks have a chance to shock on hit.

stats.key: Ignite Chance For Fire Melee Attacks
Chill Chance For Cold Melee Attacks
Shock Chance For Lightning Melee Attacks

name: Infused Weapon
description: Your melee attacks deal additional damage. The type of damage added depends on the damage type of the attack.

stats.key: Fire Damage For Fire Melee Attacks
Cold Damage For Cold Melee Attacks
Lightning Damage For Lightning Melee Attacks

name: Frozen Steel
description: Your melee attacks deal additional cold damage and you have a higher chance to freeze enemies.

name: Arcane Shielding
description: You gain Arcane Shield for 4 seconds when you use an melee attack and hit at least one enemy. Arcane Shield is a buff that reduces damage taken and generates ward, but does not stack.

stats.key: Ward Per Second with Arcane Shield

name: Flame Walker
description:
Each second if you are moving or using a melee attack you have chance to cast Fire Aura. This chance is doubled if you do not have an active Fire Aura.

You can have multiple stacks of Fire Aura active at once.

stats.key: Doubled if no active Fire Aura

name: Warden's Echo
description: When you gain Ward from {Arcane Warden} you have a chance to create an elemental burst damaging enemies around you. The element of the burst matches the element of the melee attack you used.

name: Mana Reaver
description: You have additional health and you have a chance to regain mana when you use a melee attack and hit at least one enemy.

name: Incinerating Aura
description: Fire Aura from all sources has higher base damage and has a larger area of effect.

stats.key: Fire Aura Base Damage per second

name: Shattered Aegis
description: Arcane Shield is much less effective, but can stack up to 4 times and also increases armour.

name: Crackling Aura
description: You deal increased lightning damage and Fire Aura's base damage is converted to lightning, unless it has already been converted to cold.

name: Sun and Storms
description:
You deal increased fire and lightning damage.

You gain ward when you use a lightning skill or a fire skill. This effect has a 7 second cooldown, but the cooldown is not shared between different elements, so you can gain ward from a fire skill and a lightning skill within the same 7 second duration.

name: Burden of Knowledge
description: You have additional spell damage, but your spells take longer to cast.

name: Burning Hands
description: You have additional fire resistance and you have a chance to cast Fire Aura when you use a melee attack and hit at least one enemy.

name: Volka's Razor
description: Your melee attacks deal increased elemental damage if they cost 10 or more mana. This also affects the damage dealt by all the ailments they apply and the spells they trigger from their trees.

stats.key: Increased Elemental Damage with High Cost Melee Attacks

name: Blade Weaver
description:
When you use a melee attack that costs less than 10 mana you gain a stack of {Blade Weaving}.

When you use a melee attack that costs 10 or more mana the stacks are consumed and the attack deals 15% more elemental damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack consumed.

name: Prodigy
description: You gain ward per second for each point of intelligence you have.

name: Blades of Fires
description: Each stack of Fire Aura increases your melee elemental damage.

stats.key: Increased Melee Elemental Damage Per Fire Aura

name: Sphere of Protection
description: You have additional health and you take less damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) from ignited, shocked or chilled enemies.

stats.key: Less Damage Taken from Ignited Shocked or Chilled Enemies

name: Arcane Wind
description: When you hit an enemy with a cold skill you {Chill} additional nearby enemies. This effect has a 5 second cooldown.

name: Afterglow
description:
You deal increased spell damage and have additional ward retention.

These effects are doubled if you have recently (in the last 4 seconds) either used a skill that costs 40 mana or started channelling a skill that costs at least 8 mana per second while channelling.

name: Distant Spark
description: When you critically strike an enemy from at least 4 meters away, you have a chance to cast {Spark Nova,} a spell that deals lightning damage to nearby enemies.

name: Whirling Snow
description: You have a chance to chill enemies when you are hit, and your skills have a chance to chill enemies on hit. This effect is doubled for cold skills.

stats.key: Chance To Chill Attackers When Hit
Increased Stun Chance With Elemental Spells

name: Mirror Breath
description:
Cycles the effects {Dragon Mage} and {Dragon Breath}.

For example, using a fire skill now gives a bonus to cold damage and chill chance with cold skills, instead of lightning damage shock chance with lightning skills.

name: Arcane Insight
description: You have additional intelligence, and you have a chance when you hit an enemy to be granted {Insight,} a buff that grants 20% increased elemental damage and 20% ward retention for 5 seconds.

name: Freezing Aura
description: You have a higher freeze rate multiplier and Fire Aura is converted to cold. This converts its base damage and gives it a chance to freeze enemies within its area of effect.

stats.key: Fire Aura Freeze Rate Per Second

name: Defender of Welryn
description: You have higher ward retention and Elemental Bursts from the {Warden's Echo} node deal increased damage.

name: Storm Blade
description: Your melee attacks deal additional lightning damage and your lightning melee attacks have a chance to apply a Spark Charge on hit.

stats.key: Spark Charge Chance with Lightning Melee Attacks

name: Molten Edge
description: Your melee hits have a chance to ignite on hit and the ignites they inflict have increased effect.

name: Flame Drinker
description: Each stack of Fire Aura grants you ward per second.

stats.key: Ward Per Second Per Fire Aura
Lightning Damage For Lightning Melee Attacks
Fire Damage For Fire Melee Attacks
Cold Damage For Cold Melee Attacks

name: Elixir of Knowledge
description: Whenever you use a potion, you gain ward based on to your intelligence.

stats.key: Ward on Potion Use per Intelligence

name: Essence Duel
description: You have increased melee attack speed, and you gain ward when you use an elemental melee attack and hit at least one enemy.

name: Silver Rune
description: Augments the ward gain effects of the {Reactive Ward} and {Sun and Storms} nodes, causing them to grant more ward and have shorter cooldowns.

name: Awe Strike
description: Your melee attacks deal additional lightning damage and the shocks they apply last longer.

stats.key: Increased Shock Duration with Melee Attacks
Increased Cast Speed with Snap Freeze

name: Outrun and Outlast
description: You have additional health and your ward decays more slowly

stats.key: Increased Cooldown Recovery Speed for Surge

name: Gemini
description: You can dual wield melee weapons by equipping a sword in your off hand. You take more damage while dual wielding (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.key: Ward Gain on Direct Spell Cast

name: Never Late
description: After using a traversal skill you next non-channeled spell has additional spell damage and a higher chance to critically strike.

stats.key: Crit Chance bonus Doubled for 30+ Mana Cost

name: Mental Catalysis
description: While using a Catalyst you have additional Intelligence and take reduced bonus damage from critical strikes.

stats.key: Bonus Damage from Crits with a Catalyst

name: Nimbus Walk
description: The spell damage and crit chance from the {Never Late} node now also apply to {Traversal} skills, and you gain ward when you use a {Traversal} skill.

stats.key: Ward Gained on Traversal Skill Use
Bonuses from Never Late apply to Traversal Skills
Additional Ward per Second with 60 Intelligence

name: Inscribed Instruments
description: You have additional critical strike multiplier while using a wand, additional ward retention while using a sceptre, and increased cast speed while using a staff.

stats.key: Critical Strike Multiplier with a Wand

name: Decree of the Burning Wind
description: You deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to Bosses and Rare enemies.

stats.key: More Damage to Bosses and Rares
Doubled effect with Rah Rune or Frost Wall

name: Decree of the Eternal Tundra
description: You gain ward every 2 seconds.

stats.key: Doubled Effect with Heo Rune or Glyph of Dominion

name: Brand of Deception
description: Your damage over time has additional elemental penetration

stats.key: Elemental Penetration with Damage Over Time

name: Jagged Veil
description: You gain ward on crit.

stats.key: More Crit Multi per 100 Ward vs Bosses

name: Runic Fortress
description: You have additional armor while channeling per active {Rune} from {Runic Invocation}.

name: Order's Imposition
description: You deal more damage over time to {Branded} enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.key: Brand of Deception Damage per 1% Shock Chance

name: Runeword: Avalanche
description:
When you directly use a Cold Skill you have a chance to gain {Runeword: Avalanche}, a buff that grants additional Spell Cold Damage and grants additional Endurance Threshold per stack of Ignite on the attacker.

This buff lasts 6 seconds and does not stack.

stats.key: Runeword: Avalanche chance on Cold Skill use
Spell Cold Damage with Runeword: Avalanche
Endurance Threshold per Ignite with Runeword: Avalanche

name: Logocracy
description: {Runeword Buffs} last longer.

stats.key: Damage vs Low Health with Runeword: Cataclysm

name: Rune of Dilation
description: After using a {Traversal} skill you gain increased cast speed and movement speed for a short duration. This buff cannot stack.

name: Edict of the Scion
description: Your area skills have increased area, and when you directly use an area skill you gain ward per active {Rune} from {Runic Invocation}.

stats.key: Ward Per Rune on Area Skill use
Doubled effect with Gon Rune or Runebolt

name: Cerulean Runestones
description: You have additional endurance and maximum mana.

name: Runeword: Inferno
description:
When you directly use a Fire Skill you have a chance to gain {Runeword: Inferno}, a buff that grants additional Spell Fire Damage and grants you more Armor per stack of Shock on the Attacker.

This buff lasts 6 seconds and does not stack.

stats.key: Runeword: Inferno chance on Fire Skill use
Spell Fire Damage with Runeword: Inferno
Armor per Shock with Runeword: Inferno
Health Regen also Applies to Ward

name: Runeword: Hurricane
description:
When you directly use a Lightning Skill you have a chance to gain {Runeword: Hurricane}, a buff that grants additional Spell Lightning Damage and Freeze Rate Multiplier.

This buff lasts 6 seconds and does not stack.

stats.key: Runeword: Hurricane chance on Lightning Skill use
Spell Lightning Damage with Runeword: Hurricane
Freeze Rate Multiplier with Runeword: Hurricane

name: Hunter's Restoration
description: You have increased health and every 3 seconds your next hit restores your health.

name: Primal Medicine
description: Your minions deal increased damage, and using a potion also heals your minions for a percentage of the amount it heals you.

stats.key: Percent Of Potion Healing Received By Minions

name: Tempest Bond
description: You deal increased physical, cold, and lightning damage. These bonuses are doubled while you have an active minion.

stats.key: Doubled while you have a minion

name: Hunter's Emanation
description: The healing from {Hunter's Restoration} also applies to your minions, and when you trigger Hunter's Restoration, your minions gain increased damage for 3 seconds.

name: Harmony of Blades
description: You can dual wield melee weapons by equipping an axe or sword in your off hand. You take more damage while dual wielding (multiplicative with other modifiers).

name: Ursine Strength
description: You have additional strength and take less damage from nearby enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

name: Artor's Loyalty
description:
You are limited to a single companion.

Your companion is larger and deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

name: Ambush
description: Every 5 seconds, your next melee attack deals increased damage and grants {Aspect of the Shark} for 3 seconds, a buff that increases melee damage by 75% and melee attack speed by 10%.

stats.key: Aspect Of The Shark Granted On Melee Attack

name: Tusk Warrior
description: {Aspect of the Boar} also grants increased physical damage and a chance for attacks and spells to cause enemies to bleed.

name: Boar Heart
description: You are granted {Aspect of the Boar} for a duration when hit by a melee attack, a buff that reduces damage taken by 15%. This effect has a 2 second cooldown.

stats.key: Aspect Of The Boar Duration When Hit (Seconds)

name: Hawk Wings
description: You and your minions have increased dodge rating, and you and your minions have a chance to gain {Haste} on hit.

name: Cry of the Lynx
description:
You and your companions have an increased chance to critically strike. 

When you use a companion ability, you and your companions are granted {Aspect of the Lynx} for a duration, a buff that grants 100% increased critical strike chance and 100% increased stun chance.

stats.key: Casting Companion Abilities Grants Aspect Of The Lynx

name: Call of the Pack
description: You and your companions have additional health, and you and your companions are healed whenever you use a companion ability.

stats.key: Heal Amount On Companion Ability Use

name: Rending Maw
description: {Aspect of the Shark} also grants attacks and spells a chance to reduce enemy armor.

stats.key: Aspect Of The Shark Armour Shred Chance

name: Rattlesnake Rattlesnake
description: {Aspect of the Viper} lasts longer and grants you Poison Penetration.

stats.key: Increased Aspect Of The Viper Duration
Poison Penetration with Aspects of the Viper

name: Life in the Wilderness
description: You have additional vitality and a higher endurance threshold. Your endurance and endurance threshold from all sources also apply to your companions.

stats.key: Your Endurance Also Applies to Companions

name: Serrated Claws
description: You and your companions' critical strikes deal more damage, and {Aspect of the Lynx} now also grants critical strike damage.

stats.key: Aspect Of The Lynx Critical Multiplier

name: Avian Shelter
description: You have a higher endurance threshold and you and your minions have additional physical resistance.

name: Feeding Frenzy
description: {Aspect of the Shark} can now stack up to 10 times, but it is significantly less effective (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.key: Max Aspect Of The Shark Stacks
Less Aspect Of The Shark Effect

name: Critical Bite
description: {Aspect of the Lynx} also grants a percentage of damage leeched .

name: Natural Bond
description:
You are limited to only one companion.

Your companion is granted more health and deals more damage (both effects are multiplicative with other modifiers).

name: Primal Aspects
description: All {Aspect} buffs from this tree last longer.

stats.key: Increased Cooldown Recovery Speed for Fury Leap
Increased Cooldown Recovery Speed for Crowstorm

name: Ancestral Speed
description: Your totems have increased cast speed and you have a chance to gain {Haste} for 3 seconds when you directly summon a totem.

name: Totemic Fury
description: You have increased attack and cast speed while you have an active totem.

stats.key: Increased Attack Speed With Active Totem
Increased Cast Speed With Active Totem

name: Rhythm of Thunder
description: Every 3 seconds, your next melee attack deals additional lightning damage.

name: Silent Protector
description: You have additional armour and increased mana regen while you have an active totem.

stats.key: Increased Mana Regen With Active Totem

name: Shamanic Infusion
description: You have additional attunement. You and your minions penetrate enemy physical, cold, and lightning resistances.

name: Storm Bringer
description: You and your minions have increased lightning damage and additional lightning resistance.

name: Protective Circle
description: You have additional physical and elemental resistance for each active totem.

name: Swirling Maelstrom
description:
You have additional health and mana, and have a chance to cast {Maelstrom} when hit. 

This effect has a 5 second cooldown.

stats.key: Chance To Cast Maelstrom When Hit

name: Glacial Strike
description: You have additional strength

stats.key: Chance to Chill Attackers When Hit
Chance to Shock Attackers When Hit

name: Ascendant Circle
description: You deal increased spell damage for each active totem.

stats.key: Increased Spell Damage Per Active Totem

name: Deep Wounds
description: {Aspect of the Boar} also grants Bleed you inflict additional Physical Penetration.

stats.key: Physical Penetration with Bleed with Aspect of the Boar

name: Porcine Constitution
description: {Aspect of the Boar} grants additional damage reduction, and now also grants increased health regeneration.

name: The Circle Of Life
description: You gain health and have a chance to be granted {Aspect Of The Shark} for 3 seconds whenever you kill an enemy.

stats.key: Aspect Of The Shark Chance On Kill

name: Viper Fangs
description:
You and your companions have increased melee attack speed.

When you hit an enemy, you have a chance for you and your companions to be granted {Aspect of the Viper} for 3 seconds, a buff that grants 100% chance to poison on hit and 100% increased damage over time.

stats.key: Aspect Of The Viper Chance On Hit

name: Dragon Slayer
description: The On Kill effects of {Circle Of Life} also have an equal chance to trigger when you hit a rare or boss enemy.

stats.key: Aspect Of The Shark Chance On Hit Against Rares And Bosses
Chance To Cast Storm Bolt When Hit
Mana Gained On Gathering Storm Hit

name: Shattered Heavens
description: You deal additional cold damage with spells and attacks.

name: Storm Blade
description: You have increased melee damage for each active totem.

stats.key: Increased Melee Damage Per Active Totem

name: Hunters of the Deep
description: Your companions are granted {Aspect of the Shark} whenever you are, and Aspect of the Shark lasts longer.

stats.key: Companions Gain Aspect Of The Shark
Increased Aspect Of The Shark Duration

name: Thunder Strike
description: Your melee attacks have a chance to cast {Storm Bolt} on hit.

name: Lagon's Answer
description:
Your direct spell casts have a chance to cast {Storm Bolt}.
While channeling, you have a chance to cast {Storm Bolt} every second.

stats.key: Chance To Cast Storm Bolt On Spell Cast
Chance To Cast Storm Bolt Every Second While Channelling

name: Conflux
description: Your area skills have increased area, and you take less damage from shocked enemies.

stats.key: Less Damage Taken from Shocked Enemies
Chance for Indirect Storm Bolt Casts to Doublecast
Mana Or Rage Cost As Health On Spell Cast

name: Blossoming Garden
description: Increases healing effectiveness for you and your minions.

stats.key: Eterra's Blessing On Nearby Ally On Spell Or Movement Skill Use

name: Fetid Resilience
description: You deal increased damage over time while transformed and take less damage over time in human form (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.key: Increased Damage Over Time While Transformed
Less Damage Over Tme Taken In Human Form

name: Nightshade Fangs
description: Your melee attacks have a chance to inflict Bleed on hit and your spells have a chance to inflict Poison on hit.

name: Thicket of Thorns
description: You have a chance to cast {Thorn Shield} on yourself when you are hit and you have increased armor and reflect damage back to attackers.

stats.key: Chance To Cast Thorn Shield On You When Hit

name: Natural Duality
description: You are limitted to one companion, but that companion has more health (multiplicative with other modifiers). If you control a companion you deal increased damage and have additional armour.

stats.key: Increased Damage With An Active Companion

name: Wind in the Leaves
description: Increases the attack and cast speed of you and your minions.

stats.key: Chance To Summon Healing Totem When Hit

name: Focused Wrath
description: You deal increased damage while transformed and your rage decays slower.

name: Reincarnation
description: You and your minions are healed when you transform. This scales with increases to healing effectiveness.

stats.key: Healing For You And Your Minions On Transform
Shapeshifter Applies To Minions On Transform
Totems Are Immune To Poison Damage

name: Force of Nature
description: You and your minions deal additional physical damage with spells and melee attacks.

name: Eternal Nature
description: You and your companions have additional spell damage.

name: Tiger Spirit
description: You have increased critical strike chance and multiplier while you have the {Shapeshifter} buff.

name: Primal Shifter
description: You gain the {Shapeshifter} buff for a limited duration when you transform, granting you increased armor and damage.

name: Impervious
description: Your melee hits have a 20% chance to grant you a stack of {Impervious} causing you to take less damage from hits (multiplicative with other modifiers), but you lose a stack when you are hit and you lose all stacks after 10 seconds of not gaining any stacks.

stats.key: Less Hit Damage Taken Per Stack
Lose All Stacks After 10 Seconds Of Inactivity

name: Blessed Springs
description: Increases cold damage and healing effectiveness for you and your minions.

name: Toxic Reach
description: Your and your minions' hits have a chance to poison.

stats.key: Chance To Summon A Vine On Kill

name: Hideskin
description: You have additional health and gain a percentage of your maximum health .

stats.key: Maximum Health Gained As Endurance Threshold

name: Eternal Storm
description:
When you kill a frozen enemy, a random totem is healed to full, has its duration refreshed, and its damage is permanently increased. 

This damage increase is doubled for cold damage.

stats.key: Random Totem Healed To Full On Frozen Kill
Random Totem Duration Refreshed On Frozen Kill
Aspect Of The Boar Chance On Melee Hit

name: Ocean Maw
description: {Aspect of the Shark} is more effective and lasts longer.

stats.key: Increased Aspect Of The Shark Duration

name: Rancour
description: Your rage only decays if you have used an ability recently (past 4 seconds).

stats.key: No Rage Decay Out Of Combat
Increased Armor Per Strength In Human Or Spriggan
Increased Melee Damage Per Strength In Bear Or Swarmblade

name: Piercing Gale
description: You and your minions have additional cold penetration.

stats.key: Increased Locusts Attack, Cast And Move Speed
Increased Crows Attack, Cast And Move Speed

name: Berserker
description: While on low health (below 35%) you take less damage and deal more melee damage.

stats.key: More Melee Damage on Low Health
Less Damage Taken on Low Health

name: Elder Branch
description: You and your totems deal additional spell damage. This bonus is tripled while using an axe.

name: Ancestral Weaponry
description: You deal additional melee damage with most two handed weapons. The amount and damage type depend on the type of weapon used.

stats.key: Melee Cold Damage with a Two Handed Mace
Melee Physical Damage with a Two Handed Axe
Melee Lightning Damage with a Staff

name: Flow
description: Gain a stack of {Flow} whenever you use a unique skill. Using a fourth unique skill consumes all stacks causing the skill to deal greatly increased damage. Stacks fall off after 4 seconds of not using a new unique skill.

name: Draining Arrows
description: You have increased bow attack speed and when you use a bow attack and hit at least one enemy you regain health.

name: Spell Breaker
description: You have a increased mana regen and your melee hits have a chance to inflict {Frailty}.

name: Swift Assassin
description: Your melee, throwing, and bow attacks have increased attack speed and deal additional physical damage.

name: Evasion
description: You take less damage while moving (multiplicative with other modifiers) and have increased dodge rating.

name: Agility
description: You have a chance to gain {Haste} for one second on hit and deal increased damage based on your increased movement speed.

stats.key: Increased Damage per 1% Increased Movement Speed

name: Dodge and Parry
description: You have additional dodge rating and a chance to receieve a {Glancing Blow} when hit.

name: Twin Blade
description: You can dual wield melee weapons by equipping a sword or dagger in your off hand. You take more damage while dual wielding (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.key: Increased Dodge Rating while Dual Wielding

name: Lethal Cadence
description: Every third melee, throwing, or bow attack deals increased damage.

name: Poison Tipped
description: You have a chance to poison on hit while you have a dagger or bow equipped.

name: Sapping Strikes
description: When you use a skill that costs zero mana and hit an enemy you regain health and mana.

name: Critical Precision
description: You have increased critical strike chance per sword, bow, or dagger you have equipped.

stats.key: Increased Critical Strike Chance per Sword
Increased Critical Strike Chance per Dagger
Increased Critical Strike Chance with a Bow

name: Disembowel
description: Every third non-channelling melee, throwing, or bow attack also inflicts bleed.

name: Coated Blades
description: When you use a melee or bow attack that costs mana it consumes additional mana to deal more damage (multiplicative)

name: Thiefguard
description: You have additional health and whenever you receive a glancing blow you recover health.

name: Focus Fire
description: You have additional Dexterity and when you hit a boss or rare enemy you reduce its dodge rating for 8 seconds.

name: Concentration
description: By default you have {Concentration}, which increases your damage. If you are hit by an enemy within 4m you lose concentration for 4 seconds. Subsequent hits do not reset the cooldown.

name: Missile Mastery
description: You have increased bow and throwing attack damage and you have a chance to shred armour on hit.

name: Elemental Arrows
description: If you have a bow equipped you gain 1 {Elemental Arrow} per second while moving, up to a maximum of 3. Using a bow attack expends an Elemental Arrow to deal additional bow fire damage and bow lightning damage.

name: Wound Maker
description: You have a chance to inflict Critical Vulnerability on hit.

name: Prolonged Demise
description: You take less damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers). While wielding a bow you deal increased damage over time.

stats.key: Damage Over Time while wielding a Bow

name: Storm Fletcher
description: If you have a bow equipped you deal increased elemental damage and gain {Elemental Arrows} more frequently.

name: Siege Quiver
description: You can hold additional {Elemental Arrows} and you have additional elemental resistance for each arrow you are currently holding.

name: Heightened Senses
description: You have a chance to avoid critical strikes and your critical strikes with bow attacks deal more damage.

name: Elemental Barrage
description: You can consume [1] additional {Elemental Arrow} with each bow attack. If you consume 3 arrows with a single attack it has 200% additional shock and ignite chance

stats.key: Elemental Arrow consumed per bow attack
Shock and Ignite chance when consuming 3 Arrows

name: Arrow Storm
description: When you use a bow attack you gain {Arrow Storm} which increases your bow attack speed for 3 seconds. You can only gain Arrow Storm once every 10 seconds.

stats.key: Increased Bow Attack Speed with Arrow Storm

name: Fire and Steel
description: Non-elemental bow attacks cannot consume {Elemental Arrows}, but instead generate an Elemental Arrow on use. Consuming an Elemental Arrow also increases the elemental damage of the attack that consumes them.

stats.key: Increased Elemental Damage with Elemental Arrow
Non-Elemental Bow Attacks Generate Elemental Arrows
Only Elemental Bow Attacks Consume Elemental Arrows

name: Covering Fire
description: When you proc {Arrowstorm} you gain stacks of {Silver Shroud}. Silver Shroud is a buff that gives you 100% chance to dodge the next hit. Dodging a hit with Silver Shroud consumes all stacks, granting you 100 ward per stack.

stats.key: Increased damage taken from nearby enemies

name: Poison Tipped Arrows
description: You have additional poison penetration and bow attacks have additional chance to poison on hit.

name: Sharpshooter
description: Chance to gain a stack of Sharpshooter when you hit an enemy based on your how far you are from that enemy, up to a maximum at 10m. Each stack of Sharpshooter increases bow damage and lasts 8 seconds.

name: Ethereal Arrows
description: You have increased mana and mana regen and your bow attacks deal increased damage equal to a portion of their mana cost.

name: Barrage of Pain
description: Adds {Barrage of Pain} to your Marksman Passive, Bow Mastery. You gain a stack and refresh all existing stacks of Bow Mastery by using a bow attack and hitting at least one enemy.

name: Rain of Arrows
description: Adds a chance to cause a {Rain of Arrows} to descend upon your target when you proc {Arrow Storm}. Rain of Arrows is a physical bow attack that hits all enemies in an area around the target.

name: Mana Warp
description: When you use a skill that costs zero mana and hit an enemy you regain mana, but bow attacks cost more mana.

name: Death from Afar
description: Each stack of Sharpshooter also increases stun chance and adds a chance to shred armour on hit

stats.key: Increased Stun Chance per stack of Sharpshooter
Armour Shred Chance per stack of Sharpshooter

name: Perfect Aim
description: Each stack of Bow Mastery with {Barrage of Pain} also grants additional critical strike multiplier and health gained on crit.

name: Cloak of Shadows
description: You have additional dexterity and you have a chance to receive a {Glancing Blow} when hit.

name: Once
description: You deal additional physical damage with melee and throwing attacks, and if you have been hit recently have additional dodge rating.

name: Skiasynthesis
description: When you create a shadow you regain health and skills used by shadows deal increased damage.

name: Rhythm
description: Generating a stack of {Flow} increases your melee and throwing attack speed for a short duration. This buff can stack.

name: Scarlet Stream
description: You deal increased physical damage and have a chance to inflict bleed on hit with melee and throwing attacks.

name: Shroud of Dusk
description: You have additional health and you have a chance to gain a stack of {Dusk Shroud} when hit. Each stack of Dusk Shroud adds 50 dodge rating and 5% chance to receive a {Glancing Blow} when hit.

stats.key: Chance to gain Dusk Shroud when hit

name: Pulse
description: {Flow} is consumed when you use a 5th unique skill rather than a 4th, but the skill that consumes flow has much higher critical strike chance and bleed chance.

stats.key: Unique Skills Required to Consume Flow

name: Veil of Night
description: You have increased melee attack speed. When you use a melee attack and hit at least one enemy you have a chance to gain a stack of {Dusk Shroud}. Each stack of Dusk Shroud adds 50 dodge rating and 5% chance to receive a {Glancing Blow} when hit.

name: Tempo
description: Skills that generate or consume {Flow} deal increased melee damage and have additional melee critical strike multiplier.

stats.key: Increased Melee Damage when Generating or Consuming Flow
Melee Crit Multiplier when Generating or Consuming Flow

name: Crimson Shroud
description: When you use a melee attack and hit at least one enemy you have a chance to gain a stack of {Crimson Shroud} for 4 seconds. Crimson Shroud grants chance to bleed on hit and less damage over time taken (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.key: Bleed Chance per Stack of Crimson Shroud
Damage over Time Taken per Stack of Crimson Shroud

name: Apostacy
description: Your dodge chance is added .

stats.key: Increased Melee Attack Speed while Dual Wielding
Increased Throwing Attack Speed while Dual Wielding

name: Blood Dance
description: You leech a portion of melee damage .

stats.key: Increased Damage while at full health

name: Weapons of Choice
description: You gain a bonus while dual wielding depending on your weapon combination.

stats.key: Increased Crit Chance with a Sword and Dagger
Bleed Chance with an Axe and a Sword
Increased Stun Duration with a Mace and Sword
Frailty Chance with a Mace and Dagger

name: Argent Veil
description:
When you drop below 70% health you gain stacks of {Silver Shroud}. Silver Shroud is a buff that gives you 100% chance to dodge the next hit. Dodging a hit with Silver Shroud consumes all stacks, granting you 100 ward per stack.

This node's effect has a 15 second cooldown, but the cooldown does not prevent you from gaining Silver Shroud from other sources.

stats.key: Stacks of Silver Shroud when you drop below high health

name: Perfection
description: When you use a melee attack and hit at least one enemy you gain a stack of Perfection. When you receive a hit you lose all stacks. Each stack of perfection increases your damage.

stats.key: Increased Damage per Stack of Perfection

name: Critical Eye
description: You have increased critical strike chance and you have a chance to inflict {Critical Vulnerability} on hit.

name: Cloaked Reaper
description: When you kill an enemy or hit a rare or boss enemy, you regain health for each stack of any Shroud on you.

stats.key: Health Gained per Stack of Shroud
Dodge Rating per Stack of Perfection
Damage Taken while at low health
Critical Chance while at low health

name: Hooked Blades
description: Your hits have a chance to shred armour and armour shred you apply is more effective.

name: All In
description: You have a higher critical strike multiplier, but you deal less damage with non-critical hits and damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers).

stats.key: Less Damage Dealt by Non-critical Hits

name: Shadow Master
description: You can have an additional shadow. Skills used by shadows deal increased damage.

stats.key: 2 Stacks of Perfection per Melee Attack at Full Health
Chance to inflict Bleed on Bow Hit

name: Raptor's Wings
description:
You have a chance to gain haste for 2 seconds when you or your {Falcon} hits an enemy.

Additionally, you deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) while you have haste.

name: Crimson Skies
description: You have a chance to gain a stack of {Crimson Shroud} when your {Falcon} or {Ballistas} hit an enemy.

name: Outlander's Tenacity
description: You have additional dodge rating and you gain a portion of your maximum health .

stats.key: Maximum Health Gained As Endurance Threshold
Increased Melee Attack Speed With 2h Sword
Fire Penetration Per Int With Staff
Melee Damage Per 10 Dex With Spear

name: Ranger's Mark
description: You deal increased damage while wielding a bow and your bow hits have a chance to grant your {Falcon} additional melee damage for 4 seconds. This has no stack limit.

name: Sharpest Point
description: You deal increased damage and have an additional chance to bleed while wielding a spear.

stats.key: Increased Flurry Attack Speed With Spear
Added Throwing Damage Conversion To Falcon

name: Blast Radius
description: Your area skills and your minions' area skills deal damage in a larger area.

stats.key: Increased Area for Minion Area Skills

name: Coordinated Fade
description: When you use a certain ability on your bar, you gain 3 stacks of Silver Shroud. This effect has a 10 second cooldown.

stats.key: Health Gain on Falcon Hit Per 3 Dex

name: Deflect and Weave
description: You have additional block and a chance to receive a glancing blow. Additionally, you regain health whenever you block or recieve a glancing blow.

stats.key: Health On Block Or Glancing Blow

name: Intuitive Connection
description:
{Falcon Strikes} and {Dive Bomb} are now instant cast.

Additionally, {Falcon Strikes} and {Dive Bomb} have a longer cooldown.

name: Final Souvenir
description:
You have additional dodge rating and you now have a chance to drop {Caltrops} around you when you dodge and there is an enemy within 4 meters of you.

This effect has a 2 second cooldown.

stats.key: Chance To Throw Caltrops On Dodge

name: Stymphalian Feathers
description: You have additional armor per point of Dexterity.

name: Expediency
description: Haste on you has increased effect and you gain haste for a short duration whenever you use a potion.

stats.key: Double Glancing Blow Chance If Not Hit

name: Tailwind
description:
You take less damage while moving. Additionally, you have increased movement speed and dodge rating.

These effects are doubled if your {Falcon} has hit an enemy recently.

stats.key: Double Effects With Recent Falcon Hit

name: Finesse Them
description:
You regain health when you or your minions crits an enemy.

You have additional critical strike avoidance.

stats.key: Minion Critical Multiplier per 3% Crit Avoidance

name: Stalwart
description: You have a higher chance to block hits and take less damage from hits that you block.

name: Armour Clad
description: Adds armour and reduces the damage you take from nearby enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers)

name: Aegis of Renewal
description: You have a 25% chance to gain health whenever you block.

name: Overwhelm
description: Adds physical damage to your melee attacks and increases their chance to stun.

name: Gladiator
description: You can dual wield melee weapons by equipping a sword in your off hand. You take more damage while dual wielding (multiplicative with other modifiers).

name: Axe Thrower
description: Whenever you hit an enemy you have a chance to throw an {Axe} at the nearest enemy, dealing physical damage to all enemies in its path. This effect has a 1 second cooldown.

stats.key: Chance To Cast Axe Throw On Hit
Increased Cooldown Recovery Speed for Movement Skills

name: Devouring Blade
description: You deal increased damage if you have killed an enemy recently (last 4 seconds).

name: World Eater
description: You leech a portion of your melee and void damage .

name: Patient Doom
description:
Every 3 seconds, your next melee attack deals increased damage.

Excludes movement abilities.

name: Dark Maw
description: Whenever you kill an enemy, you have a chance to absorb 5% of its health.

stats.key: Chance To Absorb Health On Kill

name: Renouncement
description: You have additional Vitality and Smite now gains spell void damage per point of Vitality, but no longer gains increased damage per point of Attunement.

stats.key: Smite Void Spell Damage per Vitality

name: Finality
description:
Your melee hits deal increased void damage and instantly kill enemies that are below a health threshold (a percentage of their maximum health).

If you have a similar effect from an item or passive node, then the highest threshold is used.

name: Future Strike
description: Whenever you hit an enemy you have a chance to inflict a {Future Strike,} an ailment that lasts 2 seconds then deals 60 void damage all at once at the end of its duration. Future Strike counts .

name: Undending Hunger
description: {Dark Maw} absorbs more health when it triggers.

name: Void Aegis
description: You have a chance to be granted {Void Aegis} whenever you are hit, granting you 10% reduced damage taken. Void Aegis breaks after you take 100 damage, releasing a void rift dealing damage to nearby enemies.

name: Essence of the End
description:
You have a chance to gain a {Void Essence} on kill.

Void Essences last 7 seconds and grant 15% increased void damage, 15% increased melee damage, and 10% reduced duration of stuns on you.

You can have a maximum of 3 Void Essences at once.

name: Steel Aegis
description: You have a higher chance to block hits and take less damage from hits that you block.

name: Battle Hardened
description: If you have been hit recently you have higher physical resistance and increased armour.

name: Rallying Block
description: You have additional armor for each hit you have blocked recently (last 4 seconds).

stats.key: Damage Taken by Attackers when Hit

name: Shield Crafter
description: You have a chance to cast {Ring of Shields} when you block a hit and your minions have increased health and armour.

stats.key: Chance To Cast Ring Of Shields When Hit

name: Crushing Blows
description: You have increased mana regen and your melee and throwing attacks deal increased damage based on their mana cost.

name: Smelter's Might
description: You and your minions have a chance to inflict bleeding and ignite on hit. This bonus is doubled for you if you are using a two handed melee weapon.

stats.key: Doubled for you with a 2h weapon

name: Infinite Bulwark
description: You have increased armor and chance to find potions if you have used a potion recently (last 4 seconds).

stats.key: Increased Chance To Find Potions On Potion Use

name: Hammer and Anvil
description: Normally you are in {Anvil Stance}, where you take less damage, but deal less damage. If you use a throwing attack you enter {Hammer Stance} for 4 seconds. In Hammer Stance you deal more damage, but take more damage.

name: Echoing Strikes
description: Your melee attacks, throwing attacks, and void spells have a higher chance to be echoed 1 second later.

name: Flawless Defender
description: While you are using a shield you have additional block chance and armour.

name: Iron Reflexes
description: You have additional dexterity and your dodge rating is converted to armour. This conversion occurs after modifiers such .

stats.key: Increased Throwing Attack Critical Strike Chance

name: Walls of Solarum
description: While you are using a shield you have additional elemental resistance and deal increased fire damage over time.

stats.key: Increased Fire Damage over Time with a Shield

name: Osprixbane
description: You take less fire damage on block (multiplicative with other modifiers) and you deal increased damage if you have blocked recently (past 4 seconds)

name: Counter Attack
description: When you are hit you have a chance to counter attack enemies with {Retribution,} a melee physical attack that deals damage to nearby enemies. This effect has a 0.2 second cooldown.

name: Shield Breaker
description: Your throwing attacks cost more mana, but shred physical and fire resistance.

name: Fresh from the Forge
description:
Every 3 seconds, your next melee attack deals additional physical and fire damage.

Every 3 seconds, your next throwing attack deals additional physical and fire damage.

Excludes movement abilities.

name: Void Well
description:
While you have 3 or more {Void Essences,} if you drop below 0 mana, you consume 1 void essence to set your mana to 30% of your maximum mana pool.

This effect has a 3 second cooldown.

stats.key: Consume 3 Void Essences To Refund Mana

name: Banish
description: {Retribution} deals increased damage and has additional chance to critically strike.

name: Void Corruption
description: Your critical strikes deal more damage for each passive point you have invested in the Void Knight tree.

stats.key: Critical Multiplier Per Point Spent In Void Knight

name: Rot Ripples
description: {Time Rot} you inflict lasts longer and whenever you kill an enemy afflicted with Time Rot, nearby enemies have a chance to be inflicted with Time Rot.

stats.key: Time Rot Spread On Kill Chance

name: Temporal Corruption
description:
Your spells and attacks deal additional void damage and Smite's base damage is converted to void.

Ignite chance from all sources is converted to slow chance for Smite, and effects from Smite's tree that depend on ignite depend on slow instead.

Smite can no longer provide healing.

name: Null Velocity
description:
Whenever you use an ability that reduces your mana below 0, you are granted {Haste} for a duration.

This effect has a 10 second cooldown.

name: Rot Grip
description: Your melee attacks have a chance to inflict enemies with {Time Rot.}

name: Woe
description: You deal increased melee damage, and you have increased armor and void damage if you have killed an enemy with a melee attack recently (last 4 seconds).

stats.key: Increased Void Damage On Melee Kill

name: Void Flux
description:
Whenever damage reduces your health below 20%, you send all nearby enemies forward in time for 4 seconds.

This effect has a 30 second cooldown.

Bosses are only sent forward by a millisecond and do not visually disappear.

stats.key: Time Shift Nearby Enemies At 20% Health

name: Liquid Iron
description: You take less damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers) and have additional physical resistance. These bonuses are doubled if you have used a potion recently.

stats.key: Doubled if you have used a potion recently

name: Molded by the Forge
description: Your melee attacks gain a bonus depending on the type of weapon you are wielding.

stats.key: Increased Melee Damage with a 2h Mace
Melee Bleed Chance with a 2h Axe
Increased Melee Attack Speed with a 2h Sword

name: Honour
description: You are less likely to be stunned, you have a higher chance to block hits and you take less damage from hits that you block.

name: Rahyeh's Strength
description: You have additional strength, and you deal increased fire damage if you have hit an enemy with a melee attack recently (last 4 seconds).

stats.key: Increased Fire Damage On Recent Melee Hit

name: Divine Bolt
description: Whenever you hit an enemy with a melee attack you have a 20% chance to cast {Divine Bolt,} a blast of holy energy that deals fire damage to a random nearby enemy.

stats.key: Chance To Cast Divine Bolt On Melee Hit

name: Prayer
description: You have increased damage and healing effectiveness if you have healed yourself or an ally recently (last 4 seconds).

name: Holy Symbol
description:
When you block you cast {Holy Symbol,} healing yourself.

This effect has a 3 second cooldown.

name: Holy Nova
description: {Holy Symbol} also heals allies in an area around you.

name: Time Legion
description:
You have increased melee attack speed and your melee attacks have a chance to inflict enemies with {Time Rot.}

Your melee attacks, throwing attacks, and void spells have a higher chance to be echoed 1 second later.

name: Shared Divinity
description: {Divine Bolt} fires extra projectiles, but has a reduced chance to cast on hit.

stats.key: Reduced Chance To Cast Divine Bolt On Melee Hit

name: Penance
description: Your melee and throwing attacks have a chance to cause enemies to bleed, but you have a chance to bleed when an enemy hits you with a melee attack.

name: Piety
description: {Divine Bolt} can also target nearby allies, healing them for the amount of base fire damage it would deal.

name: Phoenix Strike
description: Your melee attacks have a chance to ignite on hit

name: Holy Precision
description: You have an increased chance to critically strike with spells and throwing attacks. You also have additional critical strike multiplier with lightning skills.

name: Redemption
description: Bleed you inflict penetrates physical resistance, and you have a chance to be granted increased damage if you have received a stack of bleeding from {Penance} recently (last 4 seconds).

name: Righteous Firebrand
description: You deal additional fire damage with melee attacks if you have cast a spell recently (last 4 seconds).

stats.key: Melee Fire Damage On Recent Spell Cast

name: Shield Wall
description: You have a higher chance to block and you regain heath on block, but you cannot dodge.

name: Prayer Aegis
description: You have additional health and endurance threshold and gain haste for 2 second on heal while you are below your endurance threshold. This effect has a 5 second cooldown.

stats.key: Haste On Heal When Below Endurance Threshold

name: Sword of Rahyeh
description: Your melee attacks have an additional chance to ignite enemies if you have directly casted a spell recently (last 4 seconds).

stats.key: Melee Ignite Chance On Recent Spell Cast

name: Blinding Light
description: Your hits have a chance to blind enemies and you have higher endurance.

name: Divine Intervention
description: While you have 3 or more {Divine Essences,} if you would die, you have a 10% chance to instead consume all Divine Essences and be returned to life at full health.

name: Divine Essence
description:
You have a chance to be granted a {Divine Essence} when you heal yourself or an ally.

Divine Essences last 10 seconds and grant 10% increased armor and healing effectiveness. They also reduce the duration of stuns on you by 10%.

You can have a maximum of 3 Divine Essences at once.

name: Alignment
description: Every 3 seconds, the next spell you cast has increased healing effectiveness.

name: Folded Steel
description:
Your manifest armour and {Forged Weapons} deal additional physical damage with their melee attacks.

You can also control an additional {Forged Weapon}.

name: Avatar of Regret
description: Your melee attacks, throwing attacks, and void spells have a much higher chance to echo, but you have reduced melee attack speed and throwing attack speed and your skills cost more mana.

name: Time and Faith
description: You regain health and mana when you directly use Rive, Vengeance, Smite, or Multistrike.

name: Mail Crusher
description: You deal increased damage while you have a mace or sceptre equipped.

name: Blademaster
description: You have increased attack and cast speed while you have a sword or axe equipped.

name: Siege Captain
description: While you have a shield equipped your blocks are more effective and you deal additional physical damage with throwing attacks.

stats.key: Physical Throwing Attack Damage with a Shield

name: Champion of the Forge
description: You deal increased melee damage if you're using a two handed weapon.

stats.key: Increased Melee Damage with a 2h Weapon

name: Avatar of War
description: You deal increased melee damage for each hit you have taken in the past 10 seconds.

stats.key: Increased Melee Damage per Hit Taken

name: Heavenfire
description: You have additional spell damage while you have a shield equipped.
